description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular head with clean, sharp edges and a solid, blocky appearance, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty tasks. The head is attached to a long, cylindrical handle that appears smooth and uniform in diameter, providing a straightforward grip. The entire object is finished in a dark, matte color, giving it a utilitarian and industrial look. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The hammer's head lacks any claw or peen features, indicating it is likely a sledgehammer type, suitable for demolition or driving stakes. The surfaces appear free of wear, scratches, or damage, suggesting the hammer is either new or well-maintained.
description: A dark, block-headed sledgehammer with a smooth cylindrical handle and a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The hammer is free of visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cylindrical handle and the rectangular, blocky head.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat striking face of the rectangular head and the handle extending directly behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the handle and rectangular head visible.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the end of the cylindrical handle and the back of the rectangular head.
attribute_handle_type: straight cylindrical steel handle, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, solid block with flat striking faces, no claws or peens
